raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting equivalence of temporal extremes to promote equanimity toward duration and outcome",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "duration has no bearing on final effect or significance",
    "long and short spans are ontologically or practically indistinguishable in result",
    "adopting this view aligns behavior with acceptance of impermanence"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a framework that treats all temporal phenomena as transient and ultimately nullified; logically circular if 'effect' is undefined",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "user seeks reduced attachment to longevity or persistence metrics and is willing to act on radical temporal indifference",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "empirical differences in duration produce compounding or divergent real-world outcomes that the statement dismisses"
}
